tools.name: projects.gkehubProjectsLocationsFeaturesCreate
tools.description: Adds a new Feature.

tools.name: projects.gkehubProjectsLocationsFeaturesList
tools.description: Lists Features in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.gkehubProjectsLocationsList
tools.description: Lists information about the supported locations for this service.

tools.name: projects.gkehubProjectsLocationsMembershipsBindingsCreate
tools.description: Creates a MembershipBinding.

tools.name: projects.gkehubProjectsLocationsMembershipsBindingsList
tools.description: Lists MembershipBindings.

tools.name: projects.gkehubProjectsLocationsMembershipsBindingsPatch
tools.description: Updates a MembershipBinding.

tools.name: projects.gkehubProjectsLocationsMembershipsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new Membership. **This is currently only supported for GKE clusters on Google Cloud**. To register other clusters, follow the instructions at https://cloud.google.com/anthos/multicluster-management/connect/registering-a-cluster.

tools.name: projects.gkehubProjectsLocationsMembershipsGenerateConnectManifest
tools.description: Generates the manifest for deployment of the GKE connect agent. **This method is used internally by Google-provided libraries.** Most clients should not need to call this method directly.

tools.name: projects.gkehubProjectsLocationsMembershipsGetIamPolicy
tools.description: Gets the access control policy for a resource. Returns an empty policy if the resource exists and does not have a policy set.

tools.name: projects.gkehubProjectsLocationsMembershipsList
tools.description: Lists Memberships in a given project and location.

tools.name: projects.gkehubProjectsLocationsMembershipsSetIamPolicy
tools.description: Sets the access control policy on the specified resource. Replaces any existing policy. Can return `NOT_FOUND`, `INVALID_ARGUMENT`, and `PERMISSION_DENIED` errors.

tools.name: projects.gkehubProjectsLocationsMembershipsTestIamPermissions
tools.description: Returns permissions that a caller has on the specified resource. If the resource does not exist, this will return an empty set of permissions, not a `NOT_FOUND` error. Note: This operation is designed to be used for building permission-aware UIs and command-line tools, not for authorization checking. This operation may "fail open" without warning.

tools.name: projects.gkehubProjectsLocationsOperationsCancel
tools.description: Starts asynchronous cancellation on a long-running operation. The server makes a best effort to cancel the operation, but success is not guaranteed. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `google.rpc.Code.UNIMPLEMENTED`. Clients can use Operations.GetOperation or other methods to check whether the cancellation succeeded or whether the operation completed despite cancellation. On successful cancellation, the operation is not deleted; instead, it becomes an operation with an Operation.error value with a google.rpc.Status.code of 1, corresponding to `Code.CANCELLED`.

tools.name: projects.gkehubProjectsLocationsOperationsList
tools.description: Lists operations that match the specified filter in the request. If the server doesn't support this method, it returns `UNIMPLEMENTED`.

tools.name: projects.gkehubProjectsLocationsScopesCreate
tools.description: Creates a Scope.

tools.name: projects.gkehubProjectsLocationsScopesDelete
tools.description: Deletes a Scope.

tools.name: projects.gkehubProjectsLocationsScopesGet
tools.description: Returns the details of a Scope.

tools.name: projects.gkehubProjectsLocationsScopesList
tools.description: Lists Scopes.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
